title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at British Council India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at British Council India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the British Council India family as a Curriculum Developer in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About British Council India:
British Council India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with British Council India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
